scripts.install:all: cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../user-services && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../fraud-detection-service && npm install && cd ../ai-banking-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install && cd ../analytics-service && npm install && cd ../shared && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd api-gateway && npm run build && cd ../user-services && npm run build && cd ../payment-service && npm run build && cd ../fraud-detection-service && npm run build && cd ../ai-banking-service && npm run build && cd ../notification-service && npm run build && cd ../analytics-service && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --names "GATEWAY,USER,PAYMENT,FRAUD,AI,NOTIF,ANALYTICS" --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,gray" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:fraud" "npm run start:ai-banking" "npm run start:notification" "npm run start:analytics"
